text:
On Mon, 27 Aug 2001 19:25:24 +0200, Matthias Andree wrote:

> > I'll bet you a beer this fixes the problem. :-)
> 
> It did.
> 
> Result:
> 
> Exim-3.33 doesn't build with PERL_THREADED=true on FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE.
> 
> Would the ports system support a switch to prevent the exim port from
> being built with threaded Perl?

Perhaps, but I don't have time to fix that.  I'll certainly look over
any patches you submit.  Alternatively, you might try raising the issue
on the -ports list.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
